extraction_notes: All IC designators verified against schematic PNGs. Charger IC confirmed as U5200 (RAA489800). 5V buck confirmed as UC260 (SN621371). Austringer confirmed as U9300 (RAA225503A-3PH).

ics.description: Main System on Chip. BGA with PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine (ANE), memory controller, I/O.

Main charger IC (Renesas RAA489800). Converts USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON and manages battery charging. Fuses F5200/F5201 (12A-32V) on PPVBAT_AON. Inductor L5230 (2.7uH). MOSFET Q5240, Q5265, Q5216.

ics.function: SVR AON: 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX, 3-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON via PPVIN_P3V8AON. Main power IC feeding both PMUs. Phase outputs: PP3VBAON_PH1/PH2/PH3. Enable: P3V8AON_PWR_EN. Fault: P3V8AON_FAULT_L.

Slave Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0-10 (Buck7 NC on S variant). LDOs: 0-6 (all NC), LDOIV8 (PP1V8_AON_SPMU), LDOIV2 (PP1V2_AON_SPMU). Switches: SW0 (PP1V8_AWAKE), SW1 (PP1V8_S2SW_SNS). Input: PP3V8_AON_SPMU.

Master Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0-10 (Buck2 unused). LDOs: 0-6 (0/3/6 NC), LDO1 (PP3V3_S2), LDO2 (PP1V8_S2SW_CLVR_VDDC1), LDO4 (PP3V3_AON), LDO5 (PP0V8_S2_CLVR_VDDD1G). LDOIV8 (PP1V8_AON), LDOIV2 (PP1V2_AON). Sw0 (PP1V2_S2_CLVR_VDDIO). Input: PP3V8_AON_MPMU.

Austringer controller (Renesas RAA225503A-3PH). 5 PWM outputs (PWM1-PWM5, PWM6-8 NC). Produces PP1V8_S1_CLVR_VDDH from PPVIN_P1V8VDDH (PPBUS_AON). Feeds VDDH input on all 3 CLVR instances. Enable: P1V8VDDH_PMR_EN_R. Fault: P1V8VDDH_FAULT_L, P1V8VDDH_DRMOS_FAULT_L.

ics.function: CLVR0: SoC multi-buck regulator instance C0
ics.description: CLVR instance C0, CFG=D (12+2+12+2), OTP=MP. 4 bucks: HP0 (PPVDD_PCPU1_AWAKESW), LP0 (PPVDD_PCPU_SRAM1_AWAKESW), HP1 (PPVDD_PCPU0_AWAKESW), LP1 (PPVDD_PCPU_SRAM0_AWAKESW). VDDH input: PP1V8_S1_CLVR_VDDH.

ics.function: CLVR1: SoC multi-buck regulator instance C1
ics.description: CLVR instance C1, CFG=A (13+1+13+1), OTP=AP. 4 bucks: HP0 (PPVDD_GPU0_AWAKESW), LP0 (PPVDD_GPU_SRAM0_AWAKESW), HP1 (PPVDD_GPU1_AWAKESW), LP1 (PPVDD_GPU_SRAM1_AWAKESW).

ics.function: CLVR2: SoC multi-buck regulator instance C2 (S variant)
ics.description: CLVR instance C2, CFG=C (8+1+13+6), OTP=IP. S variant specific. 4 bucks: HP0 (PPVDD_ANE_AWAKESW, Vboot=0V), LP0 (PPVDD_ANE_SRAM_AWAKESW, Vboot=0V), HP1 (PPVDD_FABRIC_S1, Vboot=750mV), LP1 (PPVDD_AFR_CS_S1, Vboot=700mV). Address straps differ from C/D variants.
Produces PP5V_S2_MAIN (5.15V) from PPBUS_AON. F=1.5MHz, EDC=3.0A. Enable: PSV2TPS_PWR_EN.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Port controller for ATC0 (left upper). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDOs (PP3V3_UPC0_LDO, PP1V5_UPC0_LDO_CORE). SPI ROM for firmware. Protection: DF400 (SDR2040CSPN).

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Port controller for ATC1 (left lower). Same as UF400 for second port.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC2
ics.description: Port controller for ATC2 (right side). Third USB-C port.
eUSB signal repeater for ATC0.
eUSB signal repeater for ATC1.
eUSB signal repeater for ATC2.
Eos SE. Powered by VDDPL SE, PP3V8_AON. I2C + NFC interface.
BMU support on battery connector flex. SYS_DETECT circuit. CRITICAL.
Current sense via PPVAON_ISNS_P/N.
Summing amp for 3 phases. ISENSE and ILIMIT.
Sequences display panel power rails.
Secondary display power sequencer.
Third display power IC.
LCD backlight boost converter. CP800/CP801 MUST BE MIRRORED. CP834/CP835 MUST BE MIRRORED. Replaces BEN (U6560) from A2681.
HDMI port PCPT-A2365. Full-size HDMI 2.0. ESD protection via DZH5xx.
PCIe to SD bridge.
Level shifter for fan PWM signals.
Battery flex connector. APN: 518S0818. Includes ARKANOID debug connector.
MagSafe connector. MLB: 516S00787, Flex: 516S00788. Q5401 MOSFET pair (DS485).
Display flex connector. APN: 516S00682.
PWM FAN0 (LEFT) connector.
PWM FAN1 (RIGHT) connector.
